nasb.text: Then he made the hall of pillars; its length was 50 cubits and its width 30 cubits, and a porch was in front of them and pillars and a threshold in front of them.

esv.text: And he made the Hall of Pillars; its length was fifty cubits, and its breadth thirty cubits. There was a porch in front with pillars, and a canopy in front of them.

cnv.text: 他又建造柱廊，長二十二公尺，寬十三公尺半。在柱廊前有廊子，在廊子前又有柱子和臺階。

ccb.text: 他又建了一座有柱子的廊子，长二十二米半，宽十三米半，前面还有带柱子的门廊和篷子。
